title: Running and Biking in the Gooseberry Mesa
summary:
Eventually I made it to the Gooseberry Mesa in southern Utah. On the day I arrived I was able to get in a nice quick mountain bike ride before the sun set. I spent 3 days here at a nice camp site with good access to the bike trails. I split my time between working, running, biking, and watching movies once the sun went down. I got my fill of older movies in, watching The Apartment, The Thing, 12 Angry Men, and finishing the Lonesome Dove mini-series. The only downside was that as a novice vanlifer, I chose a camping spot in the shade for most of the day. This meant our battery system didn't recharge and I lost power on the last night of my stay. From Maya's perspective, the downsides were that A) Helen wasn't there (tear emoji) and B) I took her on either a big bike ride or run every day (exercising is hard for a little pup like her).

-Colin

photos.caption: The camping situation at the Gooseberry Mesa.
Another view of camp on Gooseberry Mesa.
Maya soaking up the sun while I worked.
A beautiful view I got from the the mesa while I was on a run.
Maya has decided that if we take more than 5 minutes to pick up her poop, she must bury it with her snout.
